message:
fix(mesh): Use actual symbol size for admission control estimation

Replace hardcoded 1KB/symbol assumption with actual symbol_size parameter
for more accurate response size estimation:

- Add symbol_size: u16 parameter to validate_request()
- Calculate estimated_response_bytes using max_response_symbols * symbol_size
- Removes inaccurate constant that could over/under estimate bandwidth

This improves admission control accuracy by using the actual configured
symbol size instead of assuming all symbols are 1KB. This is particularly
important for mesh configurations with non-standard symbol sizes where
the previous assumption could lead to incorrect admission decisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
